name: Code Generation
description: Evaluates generated code for correctness, quality, completeness, and efficiency.

perspectives.name: Correctness
perspectives.description: Is the generated code functionally correct?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert software engineer evaluating the correctness of AI-generated code. Assess whether the code would work correctly for the given task, including edge cases.

perspectives.name: Code Quality
perspectives.description: Is the code well-written, readable, and following best practices?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert software engineer evaluating the quality of AI-generated code. Assess readability, naming conventions, structure, and adherence to best practices.

perspectives.name: Completeness
perspectives.description: Does the code fully address all requirements?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert software engineer evaluating the completeness of AI-generated code. Assess whether all requirements are implemented and nothing critical is missing.

perspectives.name: Efficiency
perspectives.description: Is the code efficient in terms of time and space complexity?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert software engineer evaluating the efficiency of AI-generated code. Assess algorithmic complexity, resource usage, and potential performance bottlenecks.
